description: Unit access rewards, buff definitions, superweapon templates, support powers, aid-power mapping, and retired rewards.

buff_types.name: Drill
buff_types.description: {plural} have 15% shorter build/train times in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Logistics
buff_types.description: {plural} cost 20% less in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Mobility
buff_types.description: {plural} move faster in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Armor Plating
buff_types.description: {plural} take less incoming damage in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Reinforced Frames
buff_types.description: {plural} gain more health in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Recon Package
buff_types.description: {plural} gain more vision in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Firepower
buff_types.description: {plural} deal more weapon damage in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Weapon Tuning
buff_types.description: {plural} fire their weapons faster in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Optics
buff_types.description: {plural} gain more weapon range in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Ammo Reserves
buff_types.description: {plural} gain +1 ammo capacity per stack, allowing more ammo-consuming attacks before reloading or rearming in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Repair Systems
buff_types.description: {plural} gain self-healing in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Stealth Systems
buff_types.description: {plural} gain cloaking in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Sensor Suite
buff_types.description: {plural} gain sensors in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Veteran Training
buff_types.description: {plural} start as veterans for the player house in future launched missions.

buff_types.name: Command Capacity
buff_types.description: {plural} can have one additional unit active at the same time in future launched missions.

superweapon_unlock_rewards.name: Lightning Storm Power
superweapon_unlock_rewards.description: Grants a building-free, repeating Lightning Storm in future launched missions.

superweapon_unlock_rewards.name: Nuclear Missile Power
superweapon_unlock_rewards.description: Grants a building-free, repeating Tactical Nuke in future launched missions.

superweapon_unlock_rewards.name: Psychic Dominator Power
superweapon_unlock_rewards.description: Grants a building-free, repeating Psychic Dominator in future launched missions.

superweapon_unlock_rewards.name: Great Tempest Power
superweapon_unlock_rewards.description: Grants a building-free, repeating Great Tempest in future launched missions.

secondary_superweapon_unlock_rewards.name: Chronoshift Power
secondary_superweapon_unlock_rewards.description: Grants a building-free, repeating Chronoshift in future launched missions.

secondary_superweapon_unlock_rewards.name: Invulnerability Power
secondary_superweapon_unlock_rewards.description: Grants a building-free, repeating Iron Curtain Invulnerability power in future launched missions.

secondary_superweapon_unlock_rewards.name: Rage Power
secondary_superweapon_unlock_rewards.description: Grants a building-free, repeating Rage Inductor power in future launched missions.

aid_power_rewards.name: Airborne Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Drops 6 G.I.s and 4 Guardian G.I.s at the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Bloodhounds Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Drops 3 Airborne Humvees and 2 Stryker I.F.V.s at the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Zephyrobot Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Deploys a targeting beacon for Zephyr Artillery units you already own.

aid_power_rewards.name: Lightning Rod Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Deploys a temporary Lightning Rod at the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Ultra Miner Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Deploys an Ultra Miner at the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Kingsnakes Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Deploys a temporary Kingsnake defense portal at the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Paladin Aid Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Deploys 2 Paladin Tank Hunters for the player.

aid_power_rewards.name: Force Shield Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Protects friendly units and structures in the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Target Painter Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Marks enemies in the selected area for increased damage.

aid_power_rewards.name: Sonar Pulse Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Reveals submerged units in the selected water area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Mercury Strike Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Calls a Mercury orbital strike on the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Satellite Scan Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Reveals the selected map area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Black Widow Alpha Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Calls a Black Widow Alpha airstrike.

aid_power_rewards.name: Black Widow Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Calls a Black Widow airstrike.

aid_power_rewards.name: Chronoboost Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Boosts friendly units in the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Cryoshot Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Freezes targets in the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Cryospear Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Calls an upgraded freezing strike on the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Glacial Screen Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Protects friendly targets in the selected area with a glacial screen.

aid_power_rewards.name: Cryomine Field Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Deploys 4 Cryomines at the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Chronolift Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Relocates a friendly structure between selected locations.

aid_power_rewards.name: Repair Drone Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Drops 1 Repair Drone at the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Tank Drop Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Drops the Russian Hydra Cannon and Tank Killer contingent at the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Instant Shelter Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Deploys a Battle Bunker with 2 Conscripts at the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Motor Ambush Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Deploys 3 Mortar Quads at the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Naval Mine Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Deploys a Naval Mine at the selected water area.

aid_power_rewards.name: V3 Test Drop Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Drops 20 V3 Launchers using an isolated test power.

aid_power_rewards.name: Terror Drop Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Drops 2 Terror Drones at the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Flame Tower Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Deploys a temporary Flame Tower at the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Drakuv Prison Vehicle Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Deploys a Drakuv Prison Vehicle for the player.

aid_power_rewards.name: Repair Drones Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Drops the upgraded Repair Drone contingent at the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Elite Reserves Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Makes newly produced Soviet Tier 1 units elite while the granting Barracks exists.

aid_power_rewards.name: Disruptor Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Deploys a Disruptor support unit for the player.

aid_power_rewards.name: Spy Plane Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Sends a reconnaissance aircraft over the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Smoke Bombs Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Calls a smoke-bomb airstrike on the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: EM Pulse Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Launches an electromagnetic pulse at the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Irradiation Gamma Power

aid_power_rewards.name: Overcharge Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Overcharges friendly targets in the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Wallbuster Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Calls a wall-busting strike on the selected area.

aid_power_rewards.name: Irradiation Beta Power
aid_power_rewards.description: Irradiates friendly targets in the selected area.

Drakuv Prison Vehicle Access.name: Drakuv Prison Vehicle Access (retired: aid power only)
Drakuv Prison Vehicle Access.description: Use the Drakuv Prison Vehicle Power; the payload is not a trainable unit.

Harbinger Access.name: Harbinger Access (retired: aid power only)
Harbinger Access.description: Use the Harbinger Power; the strike aircraft is not a trainable unit.

Harbinger Tower Access.name: Harbinger Tower Access (retired: power has no tower prerequisite)
Harbinger Tower Access.description: Harbinger Power works anywhere without constructing a Harbinger Tower.

EMP Control Station Access.name: EMP Control Station Access (retired: power has no station prerequisite)
EMP Control Station Access.description: EM Pulse works anywhere without constructing an EMP Control Station.

Blasticade Power.name: Blasticade Power (retired: requires Blast Trenches)
Blasticade Power.description: Removed because a building-free Blasticade has no effect without owned Blast Trenches.

V3 Test Drop Power.name: V3 Test Drop Power (retired: test disabled)
V3 Test Drop Power.description: Custom 20-V3 delivery test is preserved for future use but currently disabled.
